name: HYPOPLASTIC RIGHT VENTRICLE
definition: PULMONARY ATRESIA WITH INTACT VENTRICULAR SEPTUM underdeveloped right ventricle ← pulmonary atresia in the presence of an intact
dominant_finding: small right ventricular cavity (apex of RV + LV should be at same level)
discriminating_features: small right ventricular cavity (apex of RV + LV should be at same level)

general: small right ventricular cavity (apex of RV + LV should be at same level)

clinical.Rx: prostaglandin E1 infusion + valvotomy + systemic-pulmonary artery shunt
